records.ety: [L. contumelia, prob. akin to contemnere to despise: cf. OF. contumelie. Cf. Contumacy.]

defs: Rudeness compounded of haughtiness and contempt; scornful insolence; despiteful treatment; disdain; contemptuousness in act or speech; disgrace.
quotes: The oppressor's wrong, the proud man's contumely.
Nothing aggravates tyranny so much as contumely.
